mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chapter (chapter_id, novel_id, volume_number, chapter_number, title, outline, content, word_count, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{chapterId}, #{novelId}, #{volumeNumber}, #{chapterNumber}, #{title}, #{outline}, #{content}, #{wordCount}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE chapter SET novel_id = #{novelId}, volume_number = #{volumeNumber}, chapter_number = #{chapterNumber}, title = #{title}, outline = #{outline}, content = #{content}, word_count = #{wordCount}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, chapter_id, novel_id, volume_number, chapter_number, title, outline, content, word_count, status, create_time, update_time FROM chapter WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId}

SELECT id, chapter_id, novel_id, volume_number, chapter_number, title, outline, content, word_count, status, create_time, update_time FROM chapter WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} ORDER BY volume_number ASC, chapter_number ASC
